story_uid.Description: Numeric story UID within the session

sound_id.Description: Index of the 3-minute audio chunk within the story

start.Description: Time within the sound file at which the event begins

sound.Description: Relative path to the stimulus audio file

phoneme.Description: Phoneme label with position suffix (_B beginning, _I internal, _E end)

Levels.sentence: Word appeared inside a story sentence
Levels.word_list: Word appeared inside a random word list

word_index.Description: Position of the word within its sentence/sequence (0-based)

speech_rate.Description: Speech rate of the synthesized audio

voice.Description: Mac OS Mojave TTS voice used to synthesize audio

pronounced.Description: Whether the word/phoneme was pronounced (1) or silent/non-word (0)
